workLog.action: Read candidates file and confirmed branch context. Issue #1749 (priority:P2, area-prompts, agent-architect, agent-orchestrator, owner:Charmine) selected by wrapper-created branch feat/1749-autonomous. Confirmed no existing PR for #1749 via gh pr list search.
workLog.outcome: Issue body specifies: create .claude/rules/clean-architecture.md encoding Robert C. Martin's dependency rule and boundary protection; align with AGENTS.md architecture directives without duplicating.

workLog.action: Surveyed sibling rule issues and PRs (#1744, #1748, #1750, #1751, #1752, #1753/#1762, #1754/#1759, #1755 family). Confirmed merged PR #1762 established the canonical .claude/rules/ pattern: frontmatter (description + alwaysApply), H1, sectioned content, accompanying session log under .agents/sessions/.
workLog.outcome: Established frontmatter convention and session log schema. Set alwaysApply: false (rule is conditional/situational, applied only when boundary-crossing changes are in flight).

workLog.action: Authored .claude/rules/clean-architecture.md with frontmatter and 10 sections: The Dependency Rule, Entities, Use Cases, Interface Adapters, Frameworks and Drivers, Boundary Protection, Pattern Selection, Anti-Patterns, Boundaries with the ai-agents Codebase, Quick Self-Review.
workLog.outcome: 15187 bytes single file. Issue's six required rules covered: dependency direction inward (Dependency Rule), business rules free of frameworks (Entities, Frameworks and Drivers), explicit boundaries with no leaking ORM types (Interface Adapters, Boundary Protection), use cases as primary unit of behavior (Use Cases), entities encode enterprise rules (Entities), interface adapters translate formats (Interface Adapters). Boundaries section ties rule to ai-agents seams: orchestrator and lifecycle skills as Use Cases, GitHub and MCP wrappers as Interface Adapters, GitHub Actions / gh CLI / MCP servers as Frameworks and Drivers, architect agent as boundary guardian. Reinforces, not duplicates, existing AGENTS.md guidance.

workLog.action: Created session log at .agents/sessions/2026-04-25-session-1749-clean-architecture-rules.json mirroring the schema used in merged PR #1762.
